name: Chin-Up
resistance_profile: Full bodyweight loads the fully stretched lats and biceps in the dead hang — strong lengthened loading at the bottom of every rep.
cues: Pull the chest to the bar, drive the elbows down
execution_steps: Grip a pull-up bar underhand (palms toward you) at about shoulder width.
Hang at full arm extension with the shoulders and biceps stretched.
Pull your chest toward the bar by driving your elbows down and back.
Bring your chin over the bar, then lower under control to a full hang.
good_when: You want a single heavy compound that trains the biceps and lats together.
You want a loaded stretch on the biceps at the bottom of each rep.
bad_when: You cannot yet perform bodyweight reps (use band-assisted chins or lat pulldowns).
You want to isolate the biceps without back involvement (use a curl).
